invariant: prefix before index i is sorted and contains original prefix elements
preservation_note: inner loop inserts key into sorted prefix
termination_use: when i reaches length, full list is sorted

invariant: target if present is within low/high search interval
discovered vertices have assigned shortest known unweighted distance
preservation_note: neighbors are discovered one layer beyond current vertex

invariant: settled vertices have final shortest distances
preservation_note: nonnegative weights prevent later shorter route to settled vertex
termination_use: all settled vertices have final distances

invariant: all heap violations, if any, are along inserted node path
preservation_note: swapping with parent moves violation upward
termination_use: root reached or parent order satisfied
